title: Account Registration and Login Issues
content: If you're having trouble logging into your HackerRank account: 1) Make sure you're using the correct email address, 2) Check that caps lock is off, 3) Try the 'Forgot Password' link to reset your password. To create a new account: 1) Go to the signup page, 2) Enter your email and create a strong password, 3) Verify your email address. If you still cannot access your account, ensure you're using a supported browser and try clearing your cache and cookies.
